title: Turret Targeting and Firing Sequence
interaction_flow: GameLoop → TurretBuild: updateTile() [every tick]
TurretBuild → TurretBuild: validateTarget() → returns false → target = null
TurretBuild → TurretBuild: timer(timerTarget, targetInterval/newTargetInterval)
[timer fires] TurretBuild → TurretBuild: findTarget()
TurretBuild → Units: bestTarget(team, x, y, range, unitFilter, buildingFilter, unitSort) [targetAir+targetGround]
OR TurretBuild → Units: bestEnemy(team, x, y, range, filter, unitSort) [air-only]
OR TurretBuild → Units: findAllyTile(team, x, y, range, b->b.damaged()) [if canHeal]
Units → TurretBuild: returns Posc target (Unit or Building)
TurretBuild → TurretBuild: validateTarget() → true → proceed
[AI mode] TurretBuild → TurretBuild: targetPosition(target)
TurretBuild → Predict: intercept(this, pos, offset.x, offset.y, bullet.speed) [if predictTarget]
Predict → TurretBuild: targetPos (Vec2)
TurretBuild → TurretBuild: turnToTarget(targetRot) → rotation += rotateSpeed
[angleDist(rotation, targetRot) < shootCone && canShoot && hasAmmo()] TurretBuild → TurretBuild: updateShooting()
[reloadCounter >= reload && !charging() && shootWarmup >= minWarmup] TurretBuild → TurretBuild: peekAmmo() → BulletType
TurretBuild → TurretBuild: shoot(BulletType type)
TurretBuild → BulletType: chargeEffect.at(bulletX, bulletY, rotation) [if firstShotDelay > 0]
TurretBuild → ShootPattern: shoot(barrelCounter, callback, incrementBarrel)
[for each bullet in pattern] ShootPattern → TurretBuild: callback(xOffset, yOffset, angle, delay, mover)
[delay > 0] TurretBuild → Time: run(delay, () -> bullet(type, ...))
[delay == 0] TurretBuild → TurretBuild: bullet(type, xOffset, yOffset, angleOffset, mover)
TurretBuild → BulletType: create(owner=this, team, bulletX, bulletY, shootAngle, velocityScl, lifeScl, mover, targetPos.x, targetPos.y)
BulletType → Bullet: Bullet.create() [pool]
BulletType → Bullet: set fields (type, owner, team, vel, lifetime, damage, hitSize, ...)
BulletType → Bullet: bullet.add() [registers with entity system]
BulletType → BulletType: init(bullet) [killShooter, instantDisappear, spawnBullets]
BulletType → TurretBuild: returns Bullet
TurretBuild → TurretBuild: handleBullet(bullet, xOffset, yOffset, angleOffset) [hook for subclasses]
TurretBuild → Effect: (type.shootEffect or shootEffect).at(bulletX, bulletY, rotation, hitColor)
TurretBuild → Effect: (type.smokeEffect or smokeEffect).at(bulletX, bulletY, rotation, hitColor)
TurretBuild → Sound: shootSound.at(bulletX, bulletY, pitch, volume)
TurretBuild → Effect: ammoUseEffect.at(ejectX, ejectY, rotation)
TurretBuild: curRecoil=1f, heat=1f, totalShots++
[consumeAmmoOnce] TurretBuild → TurretBuild: useAmmo() → ammo.peek().amount -= ammoPerShot
TurretBuild: reloadCounter %= reload
--- Bullet travels (per-tick in entity system) ---
GameLoop → Bullet: update() [each tick]
Bullet → BulletType: update(bullet) [trail, homing, weaving, interval bullets]
--- On collision with entity ---
Bullet → BulletType: hitEntity(bullet, entity, entityHealth)
BulletType → Healthc: h.damage(damage) OR h.damagePierce(damage) OR h.damageArmorMult(damage, armorMultiplier)
BulletType → Unit: unit.impulse(knockbackVec) [knockback]
BulletType → Unit: unit.apply(status, statusDuration)
BulletType → Events: fire(UnitDamageEvent(unit, bullet))
[unit dies] BulletType → Events: fire(UnitBulletDestroyEvent(unit, bullet))
BulletType → BulletType: handlePierce(bullet, health, x, y) → may remove bullet
BulletType → BulletType: hit(bullet, x, y, createFrags=true) [if not piercing past]
--- On collision with tile/building ---
Bullet → BulletType: hitTile(bullet, building, x, y, initialHealth, direct)
[heal scenario] BulletType → Building: build.heal(healPercent/100 * maxHealth + healAmount)
[enemy+direct] BulletType → BulletType: hit(bullet)
BulletType → BulletType: handlePierce(bullet, initialHealth, x, y)
--- hit() cascade ---
BulletType → Effect: hitEffect.at(x, y, rotation, hitColor)
BulletType → Sound: hitSound.at(x, y, pitch, volume)
BulletType → BulletType: createFrags(bullet, x, y) → fragBullet.create(...) [for each frag]
BulletType → BulletType: createSplashDamage(bullet, x, y) → Damage.damage(team, x, y, radius, splashDmg, ...)
BulletType → BulletType: createIncend(bullet, x, y) → Damage.createIncend(x, y, spread, amount)
BulletType → Lightning: Lightning.create(bullet, color, damage, x, y, angle, length) [if lightning > 0]
--- Bullet despawn ---
GameLoop → Bullet: update() → time >= lifetime → remove()
Bullet → BulletType: despawned(bullet)
[despawnHit] BulletType → BulletType: hit(bullet, x, y, createFrags=false)
Bullet → BulletType: removed(bullet)
[fragOnDespawn] BulletType → BulletType: createFrags(bullet, x, y)
key_relationships: TurretBuild has ShootPattern (shoot field on Turret)
BulletType overrides ShootPattern per bullet (shootPattern field, nullable)
BulletType creates Bullet instances (pooled via Bullet.create())
Weapon (unit weapon) mirrors Turret flow but uses WeaponMount state per unit
Weapon.bullet() calls bullet.create(unit, shooter, team, ...) same BulletType.create() chain
BulletType extends Content (MappableContent via Content hierarchy)
state_guards: shouldConsume(): isShooting() || reloadCounter < reload  → governs power/liquid consumption
validateTarget(): !Units.invalidateTarget(target, team, x, y) || isControlled() || logicControlled()
updateShooting guard: reloadCounter >= reload && !charging() && shootWarmup >= minWarmup
control_modes: AI (default): findTarget() sets target, targetPosition() predicts intercept, turnToTarget() rotates, fires when aligned
Player (isControlled()): targetPos from unit.aimX/aimY, fires when unit.isShooting()
Logic (logicControlled()): targetPos set by control(LAccess.shoot,...), logicShooting flag, cools down after logicControlCooldown=120t

key_methods.TurretBuild.updateTile(): Main tick: validate, find target (timer-gated), rotate, fire
key_methods.TurretBuild.findTarget(): findEnemy(range) → bestTarget/bestEnemy; fallback trackingRange; fallback ally heal
key_methods.TurretBuild.targetPosition(Posc): Predict.intercept() for moving targets → sets targetPos
key_methods.TurretBuild.shoot(BulletType): Pattern expansion, charge effects, calls bullet() per projectile, useAmmo()
key_methods.TurretBuild.bullet(BulletType,...): Spawn bullet via type.create(), fire effects/sounds, update recoil/heat
key_methods.TurretBuild.useAmmo(): Decrements ammo entry, pops entry if depleted
key_methods.BulletType.create(...): Pool Bullet, set all fields, call bullet.add(), init()
Heal or hit building, fire effects, handlePierce
key_methods.BulletType.hit(Bullet, x, y, createFrags: hitEffect, hitSound, frags, splash, incend, lightning
key_methods.Weapon.update(Unit, WeaponMount): Unit weapon: reload, warmup, autoTarget, rotate, then shoot()

drawf_usage: Drawf.dashCircle(x, y, minRange, color): drawPlace() and drawSelect() for min-range ring visualization
Drawf.shadow(wx, wy, shadow): in Weapon.draw() for weapon shadow under sprite
important_notes: Turret ammo system: Seq<AmmoEntry> stack; peek/pop pattern. AmmoEntry is abstract with type() method.
consumeAmmoOnce=true (default): ammo consumed once per full shot pattern, not per bullet.
BulletType.create() returns null if spawnUnit != null (spawns unit instead) or createChance fails.
ShootPattern.shoot() receives a lambda; supports per-bullet delays via Time.run().
Bullet entity is pooled (Bullet.create() from entity pool), added via bullet.add().
Weapon (for units) is a separate class from Turret; both ultimately call BulletType.create().
logicControlCooldown = 120 ticks; after that turret resumes normal AI.
trackingRange: turret tracks target but won't shoot until within range().
alwaysShooting flag bypasses target requirement entirely.
